r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Heart disease is caused by high cholesterol and requires expensive surgery or lifetime statin drugs

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Clear calcium plaque from arteries naturally, avoiding bypass surgery and potentially reversing decades of cardiovascular aging

headline.verbatim_text: The 17¢ "life-saver" that MAKES the heart 30 years younger?

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Audience expects expensive heart treatments (surgery, statins, procedures). A 17-cent solution that reverses 30 years of aging violates price and efficacy expectations.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Ultra-cheap heart rejuvenation (vs saturated statin/surgery messaging)

lead.full_text: My Great-Uncle Ted was a WWII veteran who survived D-Day, the Battle of the Bulge, and hand-to-hand combat in frozen trenches. But at age 72, doctors told him his heart was failing and he needed immediate bypass surgery. His arteries were so clogged, they said he might not survive another month without intervention. The surgery would cost $150,000 and require months of painful recovery... My uncle refused. Instead, he drove to a small clinic in Kansas where a doctor gave him something that cost just 17 cents per treatment. Within 90 days, his chest pain vanished. His cardiologist was stunned when follow-up tests showed his arteries had cleared significantly. Uncle Ted lived another 23 years, dying peacefully at 95 with a heart that functioned better than men half his age. What was that 17-cent miracle? It's called EDTA chelation therapy, and the medical establishment has been trying to bury it for 60 years.

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Story setup expects surgery/death. The 17-cent alternative that works better violates medical authority and cost-efficacy expectations.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Suppressed military-grade medicine accessible to civilians

primary_mechanism.name: EDTA Chelation
primary_mechanism.explanation: EDTA (ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid) is a synthetic amino acid that acts like a molecular magnet for calcium. When infused into the bloodstream, EDTA molecules bind to calcium deposits in arterial plaque and carry them out through urine. Unlike statins that merely manage cholesterol, EDTA physically removes the calcium 'glue' that holds plaque to artery walls.

mechanism_proof.description: TACT Trial - NIH-funded $30 million study of 1,708 heart attack survivors showed 18% reduction in cardiovascular events
Dr. Garry Gordon (pioneer of chelation therapy, treating patients for 50+ years)
Great-Uncle Ted's 23-year life extension after avoiding bypass surgery

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Heart disease is caused by high cholesterol and requires expensive surgery or lifetime statin drugs
three_part_structure.what_real: Heart disease is caused by CALCIUM buildup in arteries creating rigid, inflexible vessels. Cholesterol is a symptom, not the cause.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Statins lower cholesterol but don't remove calcium deposits. Surgery bypasses the problem but doesn't reverse arterial calcification. The real enemy—calcium plaque—remains untreated.

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You weren't eating wrong or exercising wrong. Your body was calcifying your arteries as a protective response to inflammation. Statins made it worse by depleting CoQ10.
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects: chest pain + statin side effects + bypass recommendations + fear of heart attack + watching others die despite 'doing everything right' → all explained by calcium buildup that no one was addressing
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Not a victim waiting for the inevitable heart attack, but someone who now knows the REAL enemy and has access to the solution the medical establishment buried

promise_architecture.primary_promise: Clear calcium plaque from arteries naturally, avoiding bypass surgery and potentially reversing decades of cardiovascular aging
promise_architecture.timeframe: 90 days for noticeable improvement, 6-12 months for dramatic transformation
promise_architecture.specificity: Remove calcium deposits, increase arterial flexibility, reduce chest pain, improve circulation

tier_1_proof.description: NIH TACT Trial - $30M, 1,708 patients, 18% reduction in cardiovascular events
Dr. Garry Gordon - 50+ years clinical experience, thousands of patients treated

tier_2_proof.description: Great-Uncle Ted - 23-year life extension, avoided $150K bypass surgery
EDTA molecular structure and calcium-binding chemistry

metadata.big_idea: EDTA chelation therapy removes calcium plaque from arteries like a molecular magnet

fssit_candidates.statement: Your doctor never told you this, but bypass surgery doesn't fix your arteries—it just routes blood around the damage. The calcium buildup that's choking your heart stays right where it is, getting worse every day.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why bypass patients still have heart problems years later, why statins don't stop progression, why 'doing everything right' still leads to heart disease

fssit_candidates.statement: The medical establishment has known about EDTA chelation for 60 years. But they can't patent it. A bypass surgery costs $150,000. EDTA costs 17 cents per treatment. You do the math.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains the suppression conspiracy, why doctors don't mention it, why it's not covered by insurance despite proven efficacy. Names the economic incentive structure.

fssit_candidates.statement: You've been told cholesterol is the enemy. But cholesterol is just the messenger. The REAL killer is calcium—the rigid mineral that turns your flexible arteries into brittle pipes ready to crack.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Completely reframes the cholesterol narrative. Explains why low-fat diets fail, why statins have so many side effects, why people with 'good cholesterol' still have heart attacks.

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Distributed throughout—in lead (personal story), root cause reveal (calcium vs cholesterol), mechanism section (suppression explanation), and close (choice framing)

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: Post-2013 (NIH TACT Trial publication created window of legitimacy)
temporal_analysis.temporal_urgency_device: Age-related urgency (arteries calcifying daily), suppression risk (establishment trying to bury evidence)
